typeDescriptions.typeString: struct LocalKittyCore.Kitty storage ref[] storage ref

nodes.documentation:
@dev Public function for the contract owner to create Generation 0 kitties.
     You can call this from Remix or another script to seed the system.

createKittyGen0(uint256).details: Public function for the contract owner to create Generation 0 kitties.     You can call this from Remix or another script to seed the system.

getKitty(uint256).details: This matches the KittyInterface.getKitty(...) signature used in     `zombiefeeding.sol`. Only a subset of the fields are meaningful for     our use case; others are returned as simple defaults.

isOwner().return: true if `msg.sender` is the owner of the contract.

renounceOwnership().details: Allows the current owner to relinquish control of the contract.

transferOwnership(address).details: Allows the current owner to transfer control of the contract to a newOwner.

params.newOwner: The address to transfer ownership to.

renounceOwnership().notice: Renouncing to ownership will leave the contract without an owner. It will not be possible to call the functions with the `onlyOwner` modifier anymore.
